aeo_readiness.summary: Sunbelt Heat & Air Services Inc is moderately well-positioned for AI search but lacks critical conversational content and schema to maximize AI citations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to address common HVAC queries.
Create conversational content targeting AI queries like 'best HVAC services in Oklahoma City.'

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but could benefit from more posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and cost estimation.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema and creating blog posts with detailed HVAC advice.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, making it less likely for AI models to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies, including schema markup and conversational content, to boost AI visibility and capture more leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.
